raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX I XXXX XXXX XXXX and the first phone number that popped saying it was XXXX XXXX I called. I called XXXX I spoke with a " XXXX XXXX '' in Customer Service and she said her phone number is XXXX ex. XXXX. That was a bogus call back number apparently. 
She told me the new flight was {$3200.00} because it was full except for business seats. I though the whole time they were XXXX. She said I would pay that and then be reimbursed in XXXX days. 
I realized it fraud so I called the real XXXX to change my flight. 
After, I called Citi Bank the same day and I spoke with XXXX different people while disputing the transaction. Both people I spoke with said I would not have to pay it. It was clearly fraud. I asked them to stop the payment the same day and it did not get stopped. 
I was charged {$3200.00}, {$3200.00}, {$6200.00} and {$95.00} totaling {$12000.00}. 
All of this if fraud I just got a letter in the mail from Citi Bank saying I will be charged this amount and had to pay it. 
I reported to FTC report number XXXX Please help
